reviews.comment:
La atención es excelente. Es el Automóvil Club Argentino. Mí padre siempre decía que en Argentina hay dos instituciones que siempre andan bien. Una es el ACA y la otra es la Iglesia Católica. Por suerte en el caso del acá sigue acertando

(Translated by Google)
The service is excellent. It's the Automóvil Club Argentino (ACA). My father always said that in Argentina there are two institutions that always run smoothly. One is the ACA and the other is the Catholic Church. Luckily, in the case of the ACA, he's still right.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJdkp2dEt3EAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar estrategico dado que de esa mano de Cabildo no hay estaciones YPF. Se forman grandes filas que superan la cuadra de espera para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
It's a strategic location, given that there are no YPF stations on that side of Cabildo Avenue. Long lines form, stretching for more than a block, as people wait to fill up.
